url.skill:title: Daily Workflow / 项目记忆工作流
url.skill:name: Daily Workflow / 项目记忆工作流
url.skill:summary_en: A bilingual project memory workflow that records project metadata, targets, current status, completed work, pending work, next actions, archive history, and AI handoff notes at project start, checkpoint, wrap-up, or handoff.
url.skill:summary_zh: 一个中英双语项目记忆工作流 Skill，用于在项目启动、工作中段、收工或交接时保存项目元数据、目标、当前状态、已完成事项、待办事项、下一步计划、归档历史和 AI 交接信息。
url.skill:upgrade_note_en: This is the upgraded version of the previous Chinese and English Daily Workflow editions; going forward, both language editions will be maintained together in this single bilingual package.
url.skill:upgrade_note_zh: 这是此前中文与英文 Daily Workflow 两版的升级版；以后中英文版本会合并在这个双语包里统一维护。
url.skill:functions: Maintains project-local Docs/ workflow files including PROJECT.md, TARGET.md, STATUS.md, COMPLETED.md, PENDING.md, NEXT_ACTIONS.md, CONFIG.md, optional HANDOFF.md, and Docs/archive/YYYY-MM.md. Supports start work, checkpoint, wrap-up, handoff, context compression, legacy migration, and safe project memory management.
url.skill:tags: project-management, ai-workflow, project-memory, handoff, context-management, bilingual, zh-cn, en

url.skill:description: Main bilingual instruction file for the Daily Workflow / 项目记忆工作流 skill.
ClawHub display card and public description.
Security and privacy guidance for project memory files.
OpenAI agent configuration for this skill.
